official_functions.role: Construct, write, decode, and observe the official Play clientbound set_objective remove fixture
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_objective to packet id 0x6a.
The remove fixture body is objective name String followed by method byte 1.
The remove branch does not serialize display Component, render type, or number format.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, objective fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer objective add/change bodies, display Component bytes, render type, number format, scoreboard lifecycle, or UI behavior.
